I have waited over XXXX days for the amount of time that Citibank stated they would complete their investigations regarding the Billing Dispute of XXXX charges of {$500.00} each, plus the XXXX interest charges of XXXX each, and I have not received that money refund to this date, despite their errors and attempts.
